news.headline: Velcan Holdings reported buying back 1,000 shares weekly for the program.
Boise Cascade buys Florida door shop from Parksite in expansion deal. Includes 22 locations, now under Boise ownership.
news.summary: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) has acquired the assets of Parksite's Lakeland, Florida door shop. Parksite, with a total of 22 locations, has agreed to sell only its Florida door shop in this deal. The remaining Parksite locations and products will remain under Parksite's ownership. The transaction was finalized today, expanding Boise Cascade's presence in the Florida market. The Parksite Florida door shop boasts a diverse range of products for customers.

news.headline: Zendesk appoints Shashi Upadhyay as President of Product, Engineering, and AI to enhance customer experience.
news.summary: In a bid to enhance customer experience, AI innovator Zendesk has appointed Shashi Upadhyay as the new President of Product, Engineering, and AI on December 10, 2024, in San Francisco. Upadhyay will lead efforts to develop top-notch products.

news.headline: AFL issues deeply-subordinated debt as Additional Tier 1 capital; to boost recognition for AT1.
Microsoft shareholders do not approve any of the shareholder proposals (including BTC investment).
Dale Reppond appointed as Plant Director for Ascension Clean Energy, bringing 40 years experience in ammonia plants.
news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, Clean Hydrogen Works (CHW) has appointed Dale Reppond as the Plant Director for Ascension Clean Energy (ACE). Mr. Reppond brings more than 40 years of experience in managing ammonia plants. He will be responsible for overseeing the commissioning, operational readiness, and overall performance of CHW's cutting-edge ACE project. This move is in line with CHW's aim to provide cost-effective and environmentally-friendly energy solutions worldwide. Mr. Reppond previously worked at OCI/Woodside's facility, which produces 1.1 million metric tons of goods.

news.headline: Edge Impulse and STMicroelectronics introduce support for STM32N6 MCU in AI solutions. Cutting-edge tech collaboration for global expansion.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Edge Impulse, a prominent platform for developing, implementing, and expanding edge machine learning models, along with STMicroelectronics (NYSE: STM), a top semiconductor company catering to a wide range of electronics applications, have collaborated to provide backing for the innovative STM32N6 Microcontroller Unit (MCU). STMicroelectronics, a global leader in semiconductors, offers a range of advanced products and technologies. This partnership integrates Edge Impulse's innovative edge AI platform, currently utilized in global enterprises for practical use.

news.headline: MDT in Michigan unveils strategy for credit unions to adapt to complex financial tech, regulatory challenges.
news.summary: A financial technology company based in Farmington Hills, Michigan, MDT, unveiled its new strategic plan aimed at aiding credit unions in adapting to technological advancements, catering to changing member requirements, and excelling in a complex business environment. With credit unions encountering difficulties in aspects like regulations, security, and competition, MDT is committed to supporting them as a trusted guide through this more demanding landscape.

news.headline: Airbyte releases connectors for Oracle Databases and Workday, enhancing enterprise-grade data integration. #OracleDB
news.summary: A recent announcement from Airbyte revealed the launch of new data connectors designed for Oracle databases and Workday. This development is significant for users looking to integrate their data sources efficiently. The addition of these connectors expands the capabilities of Airbyte's platform and offers users more options for seamless data integration. This update showcases Airbyte's commitment to enhancing their services and broadening their reach in the market. Users can now take advantage of these new connectors to easily access and utilize data from Oracle databases and Workday within their workflows.

news.headline: Xojo 2024 Release 4 enhances Mac app with Sandboxing, Hardened Runtime and Notarization. (Characters: 84)
news.summary: Xojo, Inc., based in Austin, Texas, announced the release of Xojo 2024 Release 4 on December 10, 2024. This update includes features like Mac app Sandboxing and Hardened Runtime. Xojo is a popular cross-platform development tool and programming language known for its flexibility and power. This release brings new enhancements to the software, providing users with improved security and functionality. It is now available for immediate download to all existing users.

news.headline: Cerebras launches CePO at NeurIPS 2024, enhancing Meta's Llama AI models. CePO helps Llama 3.3-70B outperform Llama 3.1 405B at interactive speeds of 100 t.
news.summary: At NeurIPS 2024, Cerebras Systems revealed CePO (Cerebras Planning and Optimization), a new framework that boosts the reasoning abilities of Meta's Llama models. Specifically, CePO enhances Llama 3.3-70B, enabling it to surpass Llama 3.1 405B on tough benchmarks. This advancement is achieved without compromising interactive speeds, maintaining a rapid pace of 100 t.

news.headline: Cerebras Systems trains 1 trillion parameter AI model on single CS-3 system at NeurIPS 2024 conference. Major achievement in AI tech.
news.summary: In a recent announcement at NeurIPS 2024, Cerebras Systems and Sandia National Laboratories have achieved a significant milestone. They successfully demonstrated the training of a 1 trillion parameter AI model using just one CS-3 system. This accomplishment is groundbreaking as trillion parameter models are currently considered cutting-edge in large language models (LLMs) and typically necessitate thousands of GPUs and numerous hardware specialists to execute. This collaborative effort showcases the potential for more efficient and powerful AI training processes with advanced technology.

news.headline: XPRIZE and IMAGINE join forces to support impact-driven creators in developing transformative tech for people and the planet.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been announced between IMAGINE and XPRIZE in Los Angeles. IMAGINE is an ecosystem that supports impact-driven creators in building better companies, while XPRIZE is renowned for designing competitions to address humanity's challenges. This collaboration is focused on inspiring and empowering the development of innovative technologies that prioritize solutions for both people and the planet. The partnership aims to align the shared vision of both organizations and drive global impact.

news.headline: Exxe Group (OTC: AXXA) acquires Chain Adoption, Inc., intending to redefine industries through blockchain innovation.
news.summary: Exxe Group Inc., a tech company trading on the OTC market under the ticker symbol AXXA, has successfully acquired Chain Adoption, Inc. This acquisition marks a significant move for Exxe Group as it aims to revolutionize various sectors through blockchain technology. Through this development, Exxe Group intends to boost its existing blockchain services by introducing a Blockchain Solutions Suite to customers via its SaaS-based services. This strategic step highlights the company's commitment to advancing in the realm of blockchain adoption.

news.headline: Rexel disclosed their total shares and voting rights as per French commercial code and AMF rules.
news.summary: Rexel has released a statement regarding the total number of shares and voting rights in accordance with Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the General Rules of the French Autorité des marchés financiers. This announcement includes important information about the company's share capital and voting rights. It is essential for investors and stakeholders to be aware of these figures as they dictate the decision-making power within the organization. Stay informed about the latest updates from Rexel to make informed financial decisions.

news.headline: LVMH’s Bernard Arnault faces off with filmmaker in Paris court over espionage case, a long-standing feud finally coming to a head.
news.summary: Bernard Arnault, the leader of LVMH, engaged in a confrontation with a filmmaker in an espionage incident that had been developing for a lengthy period.

news.headline: India's prefabricated construction industry is expected to grow by 13.5% CAGR till 2028, reaching INR 1,904.8 billion output.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report titled "India Prefabricated Construction Industry Business and Investment Opportunities Databook - Q1 2024 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. The Indian prefabricated construction sector is projected to experience a 14.4% increase, reaching an estimated value of INR 1,146 billion by 2024. The long-term growth prospects for the industry in India are promising, indicating a stable trajectory for the market.

news.headline: Lincoln Property Company partners with Cleveland Browns for new 176-acre district in Brook Park, Ohio with enclosed stadium.
news.summary: Cleveland, Ohio - Lincoln Property Company, a prominent real estate firm, has been selected as the development partner for the Cleveland Browns' forthcoming mixed-use entertainment district in Brook Park. The project, in collaboration with renowned architecture firm HKS, will encompass 176 acres and feature a cutting-edge enclosed stadium for the 80-year-old NFL team owned by Haslam Sports Group. Situated near Cleveland Hopkins International Airport, the district will span 67,000 acres.

news.headline: EverBank launches new specialty deposit division for fiduciary clients like escrow companies. Led by Tracy Miller, offering tailored deposit services.
news.summary: A recently established division, spearheaded by Tracy Miller and supported by extensive industry experience, is now offering customized deposit solutions for escrow and title companies, as well as 1031 Exchange firms and property management companies. Based in Irvine, California, this initiative by EverBank aims to cater to the specific banking needs of these sectors. The division's focus on fiduciary banking services is set to benefit a wide range of businesses in these fields. The program was officially launched on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Koning Health praises RadSite for adding breast specialty to CBCT Imaging Standards, enhancing breast imaging.
news.summary: Norcross, Georgia-based company, Koning Health, known for its cutting-edge breast imaging technologies, praises RadSite’s decision to incorporate a specialized breast component into its Cone Beam CT (CBCT) Imaging Standards. The move signifies the importance of prioritizing breast health in radiology standards, highlighting the commitment to ensuring high-quality breast imaging procedures. The announcement comes on December 10, 2024, marking a significant development in the industry. This adaptation reflects a growing trend towards enhancing breast imaging protocols within the broader radiology field, signaling a proactive approach towards improving healthcare outcomes.

news.headline: Send Exchange gift cards $10-$500 to service members worldwide to show gratitude this holiday season.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 10, 2024, it was announced that individuals have the opportunity to express their thanks during the festive period by gifting Army & Air Force Exchange Service gift cards to military personnel globally. Inclusive of civilians, all shoppers are able to send Exchange gift cards ranging from $10 to $500. To participate, individuals can visit the specified platform.

news.headline: Wheel Horse Whiskey introduces new 5-year Double Oak Bourbon from Green River Distilling in Owensboro, Kentucky. Limited release.
news.summary: Boston, December 10, 2024 - Wheel Horse Whiskey, produced at the renowned Green River Distilling in Owensboro, Kentucky, has introduced its inaugural five-year bourbon, Double Oak. This new addition joins the array of exclusive, seasonal offerings from the brand.

news.headline: InventHelp inventors from Wakita, Okla., create ELECTRONIC WHITE BOARD for accessing order & care data.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on December 10, 2024, two inventors, one of whom is a nurse from Wakita, Oklahoma, shared their creation of the ELECTRONIC WHITE BOARD. This innovative device allows for electronic access and updates to order information and care data. The invention aims to streamline processes and enhance efficiency in healthcare settings. With potential benefits such as improved organization and communication, the ELECTRONIC WHITE BOARD presents a promising solution.

news.headline: ActivTrak awarded Silver for Best Advance in HR Predictive Analytics by Brandon Hall Group in 2024.
news.summary: ActivTrak, based in Austin, Texas, was recently awarded the 2024 Silver Excellence in Technology award by Brandon Hall Group for their advancements in HR Predictive Analytics. The prestigious award recognizes ActivTrak's innovation in this field. The company's achievement was announced on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Coinbase integrates Chainlink to boost institutional adoption of digital assets. Collaboration announced in Abu Dhabi on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Coinbase's Project Diamond is utilizing the Chainlink standard to enhance utility and consolidate liquidity for institutional asset issuers and fund managers. The collaboration between Chainlink and Coinbase was revealed in ABU DHABI, UAE on December 10, 2024. This partnership aims to provide innovative solutions for institutional clients through leveraging Chainlink's onchain finance standard.

news.headline: GOVX partners with NASCAR to sponsor the Miltix program. Agreement to last for multi years. (Character count: 88)
news.summary: In a recent multi-year deal, GOVX has been named the Presenting Sponsor of the NASCAR Miltix program. The agreement was announced in Daytone Beach, Florida, on December 10, 2024. GOVX, an online shopping platform specifically catering to current and former military personnel, first responders, and emergency medical professionals, will be taking on this sponsorship role. The partnership marks a significant milestone for both NASCAR and GOVX, showcasing their commitment to supporting these important communities.

news.headline: SVN International aims for growth in 2025 under new CEO Lukas Krause with a collaborative approach and expanding in regions.
news.summary: Lukas Krause, the newly appointed CEO of SVN International Corp., is promoting the company's unique strategy of collaboration over competition in deals. With a focus on expanding their current footprint in various regions throughout the United States, Krause aims to capitalize on SVN's reputation as a leader in the commercial real estate industry. The company's innovative approach has garnered attention and praise, setting them apart in the market. The announcement was made in Boston on December 10, 2024, indicating a significant shift in SVN's direction under Krause's leadership.

news.headline: Four Seasons & Extell Development plan luxury resort at Deer Valley in Park City, UT, part of iconic Four Seasons Mountain Collection, among award-winning ski hills.
news.summary: Expanding on the popular Four Seasons Mountain Collection, the latest addition will be situated in Deer Valley's East Village, amidst renowned ski slopes. The property is set to open in December 2024 in Toronto, marking the continued growth of Four Seasons as a premier luxury hospitality and residential brand.

news.headline: Half Moon Cay renamed to 'Relaxaway, Half Moon Cay' to support enhancement and expansion. Dec. 10, 2024. More guests to enjoy stunning destination.
news.summary: A popular destination in The Bahamas known for its stunning beaches and clear waters, Half Moon Cay, is undergoing enhancements to accommodate a larger number of visitors. The exclusive, award-winning destination is set to be renamed in a move aimed at attracting more tourists. The improvements are expected to provide opportunities for a significant increase in the number of guests visiting this breathtaking location. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting revamp of the beloved destination.

news.headline: DTE Energy invests $63 million in Energy Efficiency Assistance, offering free home upgrades to income-qualified Detroit families.
news.summary: Program offers no-cost home improvements for eligible householdsA new initiative is offering income-qualified customers the opportunity to receive essential home upgrades at no cost. Through this program, eligible households can benefit from various improvements to their homes to enhance safety and efficiency. Qualifying individuals can receive a range of upgrades, including insulation, heating and cooling systems, and weatherization improvements. The aim is to assist those in need by providing essential upgrades that can help lower energy bills and create a more comfortable living environment. This initiative hopes to reach a significant number of income-qualified customers and make a positive impact on their daily lives.

news.headline: EIA STEO: Current year Crude oil production forecast 13.24 mln bpd, year-ahead crude oil production forecast 13.52 mln bps
Scrandie Beauty launches Snatched Contour Block for perfect contouring application, revolutionizing the beauty industry.
news.summary: A new product by Scrandie Beauty in Los Angeles is changing the game of contouring. The Snatched Contour Block promises a flawless application with its user-friendly design. This innovation is set to redefine contouring with its ease of use and effectiveness.

news.headline: Hybrid Software Group to repurchase shares as part of new programme.
CARBIOS's stock now covered by STIFEL, a pioneer in sustainable technologies. A study, "rePETitive biorecycling," released.
news.summary: On Tuesday, December 10, 2024 at 6:00pm CET in Clermont-Ferrand, France, CARBIOS, listed on Euronext Growth Paris as ALCRB, a company focusing on advancing biological technologies for transforming the life cycle of plastic and textiles, revealed that STIFEL has initiated coverage of its stock. The coverage is titled "rePETitive biorecycling," marking a significant development for the company.

news.headline: GROUPE PARTOUCHE reports positive financials in 2024 with €434.3M turnover (+2.5%). Three key casinos renovated and reopened.
news.summary: In the fiscal year of 2024, the company reported a positive financial performance with a turnover of €434.3 million, indicating a growth of 2.5%. Additionally, the Group celebrated the reopening of its three largest casinos after completing renovation work.

news.headline: Hermès International: Shares and voting rights updated as of 30/11/24.
Winners of Airbus and BMW's Quantum Computing Challenge announced at Q2B event in Silicon Valley.
news.summary: Winners of the Quantum Computing Challenge were recently announced at Q2B Silicon Valley by Airbus and BMW Group. The challenge, part of the #4colorsresearch initiative, highlighted innovative solutions for quantum computing. The event took place in Santa Clara, California, showcasing advancements in this cutting-edge field. Airbus and BMW Group recognized the top performers in the competition, emphasizing the importance of collaboration and innovation.

news.headline: Wealthbox chosen by Steward Partners for CRM, managing $38 billion in assets.
news.summary: Today, Wealthbox, a top-rated CRM software for financial advisors, revealed a new enterprise CRM deal with Steward Partners, an independent wealth management firm overseeing more than $38 billion in assets. This agreement marks a significant milestone for both companies as they aim to enhance their services in the financial industry.

news.headline: Newmark Group, Inc. wins Best Real Estate Consultant award by Euromoney, one of four global honors received. (Word count: 17)
news.summary: Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor catering to major institutional investors and global corporations, has recently secured a significant global win, among four prestigious accolades worldwide. The company, based in New York, achieved this recognition on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: WASDE Wheat End Stocks Actual 795M (Forecast 815M, Previous 815M)
WASDE Soybean End Stocks Actual 470M (Forecast 470M, Previous 470M)
WASDE Corn End Stocks Actual 1.738B (Forecast 1.9B, Previous 1.938B)
WASDE Cotton End Stocks Actual 4.4M (Forecast 4.2M, Previous 4.3M)
Market participants are confident in a potential Fed rate reduction. However, concerns arise if inflation figures exceed expectations.
E-Learning Market to reach USD 490.20 Billion by 2029, rising at CAGR of 11.88%. Technological advancements and internet accessibility drive growth.
news.summary: A recent report on the global e-learning market shows promising growth projections. Valued at USD 250 billion in 2023, the market is forecasted to reach USD 490.20 billion by 2029, with a notable CAGR of 11.88%. This sector has experienced substantial expansion and change due to technological progress, changing educational demands, and enhanced internet availability. The increased use of mobile devices has also contributed to this market's development.

news.headline: KARL STORZ and Artisight team up to launch Pathway.AI tool, aiming to increase OR efficiency with AI technology.
news.summary: A new tool called Pathway.AI has been launched in the US by KARL STORZ United States, a prominent player in surgical innovation and OR integration. Powered by the Artisight Smart Hospital Platform, Pathway.AI is designed to detect and address status changes in the operating room. It aims to reduce turnover times and automate various manual tasks, ultimately improving OR efficiency and enhancing data accuracy. Known for its expertise in healthcare AI, Artisight's collaboration with KARL STORZ marks a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs CEO Solomon: We would evaluate participating in Bitcoin or Ethereum markets if regulators permit.
Bureau Veritas reports share count and voting rights as of Nov 30, 2024.
MemorialCare Hospitals in Calif named 2025 High Performing by U.S. News & World Report for Maternity Care.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California, on December 10, 2024, U.S. News & World Report, a renowned authority in hospital rankings and consumer advice, announced that MemorialCare's Miller Children's & Women's Hospital Long Beach, Orange Coast Medical Center, and Saddleback Medical Center have been recognized as 2025 High performers.

news.headline: everbowl, a popular superfood brand, is launching a new beverage line called Sips in December 2024.
news.summary: In San Diego, on December 10, 2024, everbowl announced the launch of a new beverage line called Sips. This superfood brand is known for its craft offerings and now aims to revolutionize the drinking experience. The new line promises to provide a unique twist to your usual drinks at an affordable price.
